user_message:
Create an ad for:
Brand: Marshall
Product type: Stanmore III speaker
Tone: bold, vintage, premium
Visual style: A sleek blend of retro rock-and-roll aesthetics with modern minimalist design elements emphasizing high-quality materials and craftsmanship.
Conceptual technique: heritage storytelling with lifestyle aspiration
Format: image

brief.headline: AMPLIFY YOUR LEGACY
brief.caption: Set against a backdrop of vinyl records and a dimly lit, wood-paneled room, the Stanmore III speaker stands proudly on a mid-century modern credenza, its iconic Marshall logo glistening under a spotlight that mimics a stage light, capturing the essence of a live rock concert.
brief.visual_style: A sleek blend of retro rock-and-roll aesthetics with modern minimalist design elements emphasizing high-quality materials and craftsmanship.
brief.typography_style: Bold condensed serif with a vintage flair, echoing classic rock album covers.
brief.color_scheme: deep black, gold accents, and earthy wood tones
